Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader? Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78xxg05w0zo#1 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 21:51:48 GMT
G7 nations to hold emergency meeting on oil as stock markets sinkChancellor Rachel Reeves will join talks amid reports that oil reserves could be released to lower prices. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c79542n0grwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c79542n0grwo#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 08:22:56 GMT
'Night turned into day': Iranians tell of strikes on oil depotsFuel depots were hit in Tehran and Karaj overnight, with videos showing huge fires and plumes of smoke in multiple locations. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clygpxq41l3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clygpxq41l3o#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 05:40:05 GMT
Australia urged to protect Iranian football team after Asian Cup eliminationConcern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy8e978xl8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy8e978xl8o#1 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 06:51:18 GMT
Watch: Fire crews fight blaze near Glasgow Central StationThe dome of a neighbouring building has collapsed as ScotRail says no trains will operate in or out of the station on Monday. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c9wne9yxqn8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c9wne9yxqn8o#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 00:53:54 GMT
Images of face released in bid to solve mystery of man found dead in wetsuitDetectives hope the new facial reconstruction images will end an 18-month mystery. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy577wd1xgro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy577wd1xgro#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 06:07:53 GMT
Rihanna's Beverly Hills home hit by gunfire, police sayA suspect was arrested after the shooting on Sunday afternoon, Los Angeles officers say. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg2pm2kvkeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg2pm2kvkeo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 03:01:00 GMT
NHS England pauses new prescriptions of cross-sex hormones for under-18sThe health service said young people who already receive the drugs will continue to do so. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly0ppdzj2yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly0ppdzj2yo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 00:39:36 GMT
IRA bomb victims' civil court case begins against Gerry AdamsThe men are seeking a ruling that Adams is personally liable for decisions to plant car bombs in London and Manchester in 1973 and 1996. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy4ww4dp33jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy4ww4dp33jo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 06:02:08 GMT
'He's the dog of a lifetime': Bruin the Clumber spaniel wins best in show at CruftsHandler Lee Cox said Bruin was the "dog of a lifetime" as he accepted the award. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrxp4p8p77o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrxp4p8p77o#2 Sun, 08 Mar 2026 22:12:57 GMT
Paddington first new musical to win nine WhatsOnStage awards in 'record-setting haul'Other winners at the event included Jonathan Bailey, Rachel Zegler, Amber Davies and Sir Stephen Fry. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy6wn3lnyyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwy6wn3lnyyo#2 Mon, 09 Mar 2026 01:04:49 GMT
